body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Interpolations` package from `0.14, 0.15` to `0.14, 0.15, 0.16`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Interpolations to 0.16, (keep existing compat)

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Since the land team has been improving and developing the a non-default version of the integrated model, this updates the model used in AMIP runs to match that non-default version.

This should be a temporary fix.

In the next sprint, the land team should make the default version be this Pmodel based version, and then the coupler can go back to creating the land model using the default constructor.

@costachris for visibility with weather quest. This is also the version of the land model we test offline in 20 year long runs for stability. So, we expect no impact to coupled model stability but some improvement in model behavior.

title: use ClimaLand integrated model with pmodel, etc
